incident: Children in East Market have missed classes after a local learning center closed for repairs. The community needs volunteer tutors, learning kits, and temporary venue coordination.
support: Volunteer tutors, learning kits, venue coordination

incident: A government school in South District has lost three teachers to transfers. Students preparing for board exams urgently need volunteer subject tutors for mathematics and science.
support: Mathematics tutors, science tutors, exam preparation support

incident: The community library in Central Ward has been closed for two months due to staffing shortages. Volunteers are needed to reopen it part-time and run a weekly reading program for children.
support: Library volunteers, reading program facilitators, book donations

incident: Migrant worker families in West End have children who are not enrolled in school. Volunteers are needed to assist with enrollment documentation, language support, and school supply kits.
support: Enrollment support, language assistance, school supply kits

incident: A digital literacy program in North Point needs volunteer instructors to teach basic computer skills to women and senior citizens at the community center twice a week.
support: Computer literacy instructors, device support, training materials
